class.name: NetfoxLogger
class.brief_description: Logger implementation for use with netfox
class.description: NetfoxLoggers implement distinct log levels. These can be used to filter which messages are actually emitted. All messages are output using [method @GlobalScope.print]. Warnings and errors are also pushed to the debug panel, using [method @GlobalScope.push_warning] and [method @GlobalScope.push_error] respectively, if [member push_to_debugger] is enabled. [br][br]Every logger has a name, and belongs to a module. Logging level can be overridden per module, using [member module_log_level]. [br][br]Loggers also support tags. Tags can be used to provide extra pieces of information that are logged with each message. Some tags are provided by netfox. Additional tags can be added using [method register_tag].

method.name: register_tag
method.description: Register a tag [br][br]Tags are callables that provide pieces of context, included in all log messges. The [param tag] callable must return a string.

method.name: trace
method.description: Log a trace message [br][br]Traces are the most verbose, usually used for drilling down into very niche bugs.

method.name: debug
method.description: Log a debug message [br][br]Debug messages are verbose, usually used to reconstruct and investigate bugs.

method.name: info
method.description: Log an info message [br][br]Info messages provide general notifications about application events.

method.name: warning
method.description: Log a warning message [br][br]This is also forwarded to [method @GlobalScope.push_warning], if enabled with [member push_to_debugger]. Warning messages usually indicate that something has gone wrong, but is recoverable.

method.name: error
method.description: Log an error message [br][br]This is also forwarded to [method @GlobalScope.push_error], if enabled with [member push_to_debugger]. Error messages usually indicate an issue that can't be recovered from.

members.member: Global logging level, used by all loggers
Per-module logging level, used only by loggers belonging to the given module [br][br]This is a dictionary that associates module names ( strings ) to log levels ( int, e.g. [constant LOG_DEBUG] ).
Set to true to enable calling [@GlobalScope.push_warning] and [@GlobalScope.push_error]

constants.constant: Filter level to log every message
Trace logs, the most verbose level
Filter level to log no messages
Default log level to fall back on, if not configured
